```{r}
V(g_U2019)[V(g_U2019)$name %in% mother_ids_U2019]$type   <- "mother-daughter"
V(g_U2019)[V(g_U2019)$name %in% daughter_ids_U2019]$type <- "mother-daughter"

plot(g_U2019, edge.width = E(g_U2019)$weight*6,layout = layout_with_fr,vertex.color = ifelse(V(g_U2019)$type == "mother-daughter",   "darkcyan", "gray"),vertex.label = V(g_U2019)$name,edge.color="plum3")
```

```{r}
md_lookup_U2019 <- mother_daughter_UA %>%
  filter(year == 2019) %>%                       
  pivot_longer(cols = c("rfid_mom", "rfid_off"), values_to = "ID") %>%
  select(ID, pairID)

IDs_U2019<- match(V(g_U2019)$name, md_lookup_U2019$ID)   
V(g_U2019)$pairID <- md_lookup_U2019$pairID[IDs_U2019] 

pair_IDs_U2019<- factor(V(g_U2019)$pairID)

n_pairs_U2019<-length(levels(na.omit(pair_IDs_U2019)))
my_palette_U2019<-brewer.pal(n = max(3,n_pairs_U2019), name = "Paired") 

pair_colors_U2019<- my_palette_U2019[pair_IDs_U2019]
pair_colors_U2019[is.na(pair_colors_U2019)] <- "gray80"
```

big plot

```{r}
plot(g_U2019, edge.width = E(g_U2019)$weight*6,edge.curved=F,vertex.color =pair_colors_U2019, vertex.size = 15, vertex.label.cex = 0.7)
pair_levels_U2019<- levels(na.omit(pair_IDs_U2019))
legend_colors_U2019 <- my_palette_U2019[seq_along(pair_levels_U2019)]

legend(
  "topleft",
  legend = c(paste("Pair", pair_levels_U2019), "random pair"),
  col    = c(legend_colors_U2019, "gray80"),
  pch    = 19,
  pt.cex = 2,
  bty    = "n"
)
```

###edge list

```{r}
edge_U2019 <- igraph::as_data_frame(g_U2019, what = "edges")

pid <- V(g_U2019)$pairID
names(pid) <- V(g_U2019)$name

from_pid <- pid[ edge_U2019$from ]
to_pid   <- pid[ edge_U2019$to ]

edge_U2019$pair_type <- ifelse(
  !is.na(from_pid) & !is.na(to_pid) & (from_pid == to_pid),
  "mother-daughter",
  "other"
)
write.csv(edge_U2019, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2019.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#UA 2020


```{r, include= FALSE}
UA_2020<-read.csv("UA_2020_full_dayroost.csv",header=TRUE,sep=";",check.names = F,row.names=NULL)

UA_2020<-UA_2020[c(1:31)]
UA_2020[UA_2020 == "juv"] <- NA

UA_2020 <- UA_2020 %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace(., . == "", NA)))

UA_2020 <- UA_2020 %>%
  mutate(across(-date, as.character))


```

### GBI matrix

```{r GBI matrix}
data_U2020<- UA_2020 %>%pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(date),  
    names_to = "ID",                     
    values_to = "box"                       
  ) %>%
  drop_na(box)

#group = date+box
data_U2020$date<- as.Date(data_U2020$date, format = "%d.%m.%Y")
data_U2020$daygroup<-as.factor(paste(data_U2020$date, data_U2020$box, sep="_"))

ind_U2020<-data.table(ID=c(data_U2020$ID), group=data_U2020$daygroup, day=c(data_U2020$date)) #df with 3 col: ID, group and day 
GBI_U2020<- get_group_by_individual(ind_U2020, data_format = "individuals") #get group by individual matrix with 0 or 1 when present
GBI_U2020 <- as.matrix(GBI_U2020)

write.csv(GBI_U2020, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/fullGBI_U2020.csv", row.names = TRUE)

```
###network

```{r}
net_U2020<-get_network(GBI_U2020,data_format = "GBI",association_index = "SRI")

write.csv(net_U2020,"C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_net_U2020", row.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
g_U2020<- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(net_U2020,mode = "undirected",weighted = TRUE,diag = FALSE) 
plot(g_U2020,vertex.label = V(g_U2020)$name,edge.width = E(g_U2020)$weight * 6, layout = layout_with_fr, vertex.color = "lightblue",edge.color = "plum3") 
```
###vertex attributes

```{r}
mother_ids_U2020<- mother_daughter_UA$rfid_mom[mother_daughter_UA$year == 2020]
daughter_ids_U2020<- mother_daughter_UA$rfid_off[mother_daughter_UA$year == 2020]

V(g_U2020)$type <- "other"  # default value
V(g_U2020)[V(g_U2020)$name %in% mother_ids_U2020]$type   <- "mother-daughter"
V(g_U2020)[V(g_U2020)$name %in% daughter_ids_U2020]$type <- "mother-daughter"

plot(g_U2020, edge.width = E(g_U2020)$weight*6,layout = layout_with_fr,vertex.color = ifelse(V(g_U2020)$type == "mother-daughter",   "darkcyan", "gray"),vertex.label = V(g_U2020)$name,edge.color="plum3")
```

```{r}
md_lookup_U2020 <- mother_daughter_UA %>%
  filter(year == 2020) %>%                    
  pivot_longer(cols = c("rfid_mom", "rfid_off"), values_to = "ID") %>%
  select(ID, pairID)

IDs_U2020<- match(V(g_U2020)$name, md_lookup_U2020$ID)  
V(g_U2020)$pairID <- md_lookup_U2020$pairID[IDs_U2020] 

pair_IDs_U2020<- factor(V(g_U2020)$pairID)

n_pairs_U2020<-length(levels(na.omit(pair_IDs_U2020)))
my_palette_U2020<-brewer.pal(n = max(3,n_pairs_U2020), name = "Paired") 

pair_colors_U2020<- my_palette_U2020[pair_IDs_U2020]
pair_colors_U2020[is.na(pair_colors_U2020)] <- "gray80"
```

big plot

```{r}
plot(g_U2020, edge.width = E(g_U2020)$weight*6,edge.curved=F,vertex.color =pair_colors_U2020, vertex.size = 15, vertex.label.cex = 0.7)
pair_levels_U2020<- levels(na.omit(pair_IDs_U2020))
legend_colors_U2020 <- my_palette_U2020[seq_along(pair_levels_U2020)]

legend(
  "topleft",
  legend = c(paste("Pair", pair_levels_U2020), "random pair"),
  col    = c(legend_colors_U2020, "gray80"),
  pch    = 19,
  pt.cex = 2,
  bty    = "n"
)
```

###edge list

```{r}
edge_U2020 <- igraph::as_data_frame(g_U2020, what = "edges")

pid <- V(g_U2020)$pairID
names(pid) <- V(g_U2020)$name

from_pid <- pid[ edge_U2020$from ]
to_pid   <- pid[ edge_U2020$to ]

edge_U2020$pair_type <- ifelse(
  !is.na(from_pid) & !is.na(to_pid) & (from_pid == to_pid),
  "mother-daughter",
  "other"
)
write.csv(edge_U2020, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2020.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#UA 2021

```{r, include= FALSE}
UA_2021<-read.csv("UA_2021_full_dayroost.csv",header=TRUE,sep=";",check.names = F,row.names=NULL)

UA_2021<-UA_2021[c(1:38)]
UA_2021[UA_2021 == "juv"] <- NA

UA_2021 <- UA_2021 %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace(., . == "", NA)))

UA_2021 <- UA_2021 %>%
  mutate(across(-date, as.character))

names(UA_2021)[names(UA_2021) == "9B39"] <- "F50E"
names(UA_2021)[names(UA_2021) == "37F2"] <- "100F"
```

### GBI matrix

```{r GBI matrix}
data_U2021<- UA_2021 %>%pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(date),  
    names_to = "ID",                     
    values_to = "box"                       
  ) %>%
  drop_na(box)

#group = date+box
data_U2021$date<- as.Date(data_U2021$date, format = "%d.%m.%Y")
data_U2021$daygroup<-as.factor(paste(data_U2021$date, data_U2021$box, sep="_"))

ind_U2021<-data.table(ID=c(data_U2021$ID), group=data_U2021$daygroup, day=c(data_U2021$date)) #df with 3 col: ID, group and day 
GBI_U2021<- get_group_by_individual(ind_U2021, data_format = "individuals") #get group by individual matrix with 0 or 1 when present
GBI_U2021 <- as.matrix(GBI_U2021)

write.csv(GBI_U2021, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/fullGBI_U2021.csv", row.names = TRUE)

```
###network

```{r}
net_U2021<-get_network(GBI_U2021,data_format = "GBI",association_index = "SRI")

write.csv(net_U2021,"C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_net_U2021", row.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
g_U2021<- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(net_U2021,mode = "undirected",weighted = TRUE,diag = FALSE) 
plot(g_U2021,vertex.label = V(g_U2021)$name,edge.width = E(g_U2021)$weight * 6, layout = layout_with_fr, vertex.color = "lightblue",edge.color = "plum3") 
```
###vertex attributes

```{r}
mother_ids_U2021<- mother_daughter_UA$rfid_mom[mother_daughter_UA$year == 2021]
daughter_ids_U2021<- mother_daughter_UA$rfid_off[mother_daughter_UA$year == 2021]

V(g_U2021)$type <- "other"  # default value
V(g_U2021)[V(g_U2021)$name %in% mother_ids_U2021]$type   <- "mother-daughter"
V(g_U2021)[V(g_U2021)$name %in% daughter_ids_U2021]$type <- "mother-daughter"

plot(g_U2021, edge.width = E(g_U2021)$weight*6,layout = layout_with_fr,vertex.color = ifelse(V(g_U2021)$type == "mother-daughter",   "darkcyan", "gray"),vertex.label = V(g_U2021)$name,edge.color="plum3")
```

```{r}
md_lookup_U2021 <- mother_daughter_UA %>%
  filter(year == 2021) %>%                     
  pivot_longer(cols = c("rfid_mom", "rfid_off"), values_to = "ID") %>%
  select(ID, pairID)

IDs_U2021<- match(V(g_U2021)$name, md_lookup_U2021$ID)   
V(g_U2021)$pairID <- md_lookup_U2021$pairID[IDs_U2021] 

pair_IDs_U2021<- factor(V(g_U2021)$pairID)

n_pairs_U2021<-length(levels(na.omit(pair_IDs_U2021)))
my_palette_U2021<-brewer.pal(n = max(3,n_pairs_U2021), name = "Paired") 

pair_colors_U2021<- my_palette_U2021[pair_IDs_U2021]
pair_colors_U2021[is.na(pair_colors_U2021)] <- "gray80"
```

big plot

```{r}
plot(g_U2021, edge.width = E(g_U2021)$weight*6,edge.curved=F,vertex.color =pair_colors_U2021, vertex.size = 15, vertex.label.cex = 0.7)
pair_levels_U2021<- levels(na.omit(pair_IDs_U2021))
legend_colors_U2021 <- my_palette_U2021[seq_along(pair_levels_U2021)]

legend(
  "topleft",
  legend = c(paste("Pair", pair_levels_U2021), "random pair"),
  col    = c(legend_colors_U2021, "gray80"),
  pch    = 19,
  pt.cex = 2,
  bty    = "n"
)
```

###edge list

```{r}
edge_U2021 <- igraph::as_data_frame(g_U2021, what = "edges")

pid <- V(g_U2021)$pairID
names(pid) <- V(g_U2021)$name

from_pid <- pid[ edge_U2021$from ]
to_pid   <- pid[ edge_U2021$to ]

edge_U2021$pair_type <- ifelse(
  !is.na(from_pid) & !is.na(to_pid) & (from_pid == to_pid),
  "mother-daughter",
  "other"
)
write.csv(edge_U2021, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2021.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#UA 2022

```{r, include= FALSE}
UA_2022<-read.csv("UA_2022_full_dayroost.csv",header=TRUE,sep=";",check.names = F,row.names=NULL)

UA_2022<-UA_2022[c(1:35)]
UA_2022[UA_2022 == "juv"] <- NA

UA_2022 <- UA_2022 %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace(., . == "", NA)))

UA_2022 <- UA_2022 %>%
  mutate(across(-date, as.character))
```

### GBI matrix

```{r GBI matrix}
data_U2022<- UA_2022 %>%pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(date),  
    names_to = "ID",                     
    values_to = "box"                       
  ) %>%
  drop_na(box)

#group = date+box
data_U2022$date<- as.Date(data_U2022$date, format = "%d.%m.%Y")
data_U2022$daygroup<-as.factor(paste(data_U2022$date, data_U2022$box, sep="_"))

ind_U2022<-data.table(ID=c(data_U2022$ID), group=data_U2022$daygroup, day=c(data_U2022$date)) #df with 3 col: ID, group and day 
GBI_U2022<- get_group_by_individual(ind_U2022, data_format = "individuals") #get group by individual matrix with 0 or 1 when present
GBI_U2022 <- as.matrix(GBI_U2022)

write.csv(GBI_U2022, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/fullGBI_U2022.csv", row.names = TRUE)

```
###network

```{r}
net_U2022<-get_network(GBI_U2022,data_format = "GBI",association_index = "SRI")

write.csv(net_U2022,"C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_net_U2022", row.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
g_U2022<- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(net_U2022,mode = "undirected",weighted = TRUE,diag = FALSE) 
plot(g_U2022,vertex.label = V(g_U2022)$name,edge.width = E(g_U2022)$weight * 6, layout = layout_with_fr, vertex.color = "lightblue",edge.color = "plum3") 
```
###vertex attributes

```{r}
mother_ids_U2022<- mother_daughter_UA$rfid_mom[mother_daughter_UA$year == 2022]
daughter_ids_U2022<- mother_daughter_UA$rfid_off[mother_daughter_UA$year == 2022]

V(g_U2022)$type <- "other"  # default value
V(g_U2022)[V(g_U2022)$name %in% mother_ids_U2022]$type   <- "mother-daughter"
V(g_U2022)[V(g_U2022)$name %in% daughter_ids_U2022]$type <- "mother-daughter"

plot(g_U2022, edge.width = E(g_U2022)$weight*6,layout = layout_with_fr,vertex.color = ifelse(V(g_U2022)$type == "mother-daughter",   "darkcyan", "gray"),vertex.label = V(g_U2022)$name,edge.color="plum3")
```

```{r}
md_lookup_U2022 <- mother_daughter_UA %>%
  filter(year == 2022) %>%                      
  pivot_longer(cols = c("rfid_mom", "rfid_off"), values_to = "ID") %>%
  select(ID, pairID)

IDs_U2022<- match(V(g_U2022)$name, md_lookup_U2022$ID)  
V(g_U2022)$pairID <- md_lookup_U2022$pairID[IDs_U2022] 

pair_IDs_U2022<- factor(V(g_U2022)$pairID)

n_pairs_U2022<-length(levels(na.omit(pair_IDs_U2022)))
my_palette_U2022<-brewer.pal(n = max(3,n_pairs_U2022), name = "Paired") 

pair_colors_U2022<- my_palette_U2022[pair_IDs_U2022]
pair_colors_U2022[is.na(pair_colors_U2022)] <- "gray80"
```

big plot

```{r}
plot(g_U2022, edge.width = E(g_U2022)$weight*6,edge.curved=F,vertex.color =pair_colors_U2022, vertex.size = 15, vertex.label.cex = 0.7)
pair_levels_U2022<- levels(na.omit(pair_IDs_U2022))
legend_colors_U2022 <- my_palette_U2022[seq_along(pair_levels_U2022)]

legend(
  "topleft",
  legend = c(paste("Pair", pair_levels_U2022), "random pair"),
  col    = c(legend_colors_U2022, "gray80"),
  pch    = 19,
  pt.cex = 2,
  bty    = "n"
)
```

###edge list

```{r}
edge_U2022 <- igraph::as_data_frame(g_U2022, what = "edges")

pid <- V(g_U2022)$pairID
names(pid) <- V(g_U2022)$name

from_pid <- pid[ edge_U2022$from ]
to_pid   <- pid[ edge_U2022$to ]

edge_U2022$pair_type <- ifelse(
  !is.na(from_pid) & !is.na(to_pid) & (from_pid == to_pid),
  "mother-daughter",
  "other"
)
write.csv(edge_U2022, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2022.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#UA 2023


```{r, include= FALSE}
UA_2023<-read.csv("UA_2023_full_dayroost.csv",header=TRUE,sep=";",check.names = F,row.names=NULL)

UA_2023<-UA_2023[c(1:30)]
UA_2023[UA_2023 == "juv"] <- NA

UA_2023 <- UA_2023 %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace(., . == "", NA)))

UA_2023 <- UA_2023 %>%
  mutate(across(-date, as.character))

mother_daughter_UA$rfid_off[mother_daughter_UA$rfid_off == "AE33"] <- "F50E"
```

### GBI matrix

```{r GBI matrix}
data_U2023<- UA_2023 %>%pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(date),  
    names_to = "ID",                     
    values_to = "box"                       
  ) %>%
  drop_na(box)

#group = date+box
data_U2023$date<- as.Date(data_U2023$date, format = "%d.%m.%Y")
data_U2023$daygroup<-as.factor(paste(data_U2023$date, data_U2023$box, sep="_"))

ind_U2023<-data.table(ID=c(data_U2023$ID), group=data_U2023$daygroup, day=c(data_U2023$date)) #df with 3 col: ID, group and day 
GBI_U2023<- get_group_by_individual(ind_U2023, data_format = "individuals") #get group by individual matrix with 0 or 1 when present
GBI_U2023 <- as.matrix(GBI_U2023)

write.csv(GBI_U2023, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/fullGBI_U2023.csv", row.names = TRUE)

```
###network

```{r}
net_U2023<-get_network(GBI_U2023,data_format = "GBI",association_index = "SRI")

write.csv(net_U2023,"C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_net_U2023", row.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
g_U2023<- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(net_U2023,mode = "undirected",weighted = TRUE,diag = FALSE) 
plot(g_U2023,vertex.label = V(g_U2023)$name,edge.width = E(g_U2023)$weight * 6, layout = layout_with_fr, vertex.color = "lightblue",edge.color = "plum3") 
```
###vertex attributes

```{r}
mother_ids_U2023<- mother_daughter_UA$rfid_mom[mother_daughter_UA$year == 2023]
daughter_ids_U2023<- mother_daughter_UA$rfid_off[mother_daughter_UA$year == 2023]

V(g_U2023)$type <- "other"  # default value
V(g_U2023)[V(g_U2023)$name %in% mother_ids_U2023]$type   <- "mother-daughter"
V(g_U2023)[V(g_U2023)$name %in% daughter_ids_U2023]$type <- "mother-daughter"

plot(g_U2023, edge.width = E(g_U2023)$weight*6,layout = layout_with_fr,vertex.color = ifelse(V(g_U2023)$type == "mother-daughter",   "darkcyan", "gray"),vertex.label = V(g_U2023)$name,edge.color="plum3")
```

```{r}
md_lookup_U2023 <- mother_daughter_UA %>%
  filter(year == 2023) %>%                    
  pivot_longer(cols = c("rfid_mom", "rfid_off"), values_to = "ID") %>%
  select(ID, pairID)

IDs_U2023<- match(V(g_U2023)$name, md_lookup_U2023$ID)   
V(g_U2023)$pairID <- md_lookup_U2023$pairID[IDs_U2023] 

pair_IDs_U2023<- factor(V(g_U2023)$pairID)

n_pairs_U2023<-length(levels(na.omit(pair_IDs_U2023)))
my_palette_U2023<-brewer.pal(n = max(3,n_pairs_U2023), name = "Paired") 


pair_colors_U2023<- my_palette_U2023[pair_IDs_U2023]
pair_colors_U2023[is.na(pair_colors_U2023)] <- "gray80"
```

big plot

```{r}
plot(g_U2023, edge.width = E(g_U2023)$weight*6,edge.curved=F,vertex.color =pair_colors_U2023, vertex.size = 15, vertex.label.cex = 0.7)
pair_levels_U2023<- levels(na.omit(pair_IDs_U2023))
legend_colors_U2023 <- my_palette_U2023[seq_along(pair_levels_U2023)]

legend(
  "topleft",
  legend = c(paste("Pair", pair_levels_U2023), "random pair"),
  col    = c(legend_colors_U2023, "gray80"),
  pch    = 19,
  pt.cex = 2,
  bty    = "n"
)
```

###edge list

```{r}
edge_U2023 <- igraph::as_data_frame(g_U2023, what = "edges")

pid <- V(g_U2023)$pairID
names(pid) <- V(g_U2023)$name

from_pid <- pid[ edge_U2023$from ]
to_pid   <- pid[ edge_U2023$to ]

edge_U2023$pair_type <- ifelse(
  !is.na(from_pid) & !is.na(to_pid) & (from_pid == to_pid),
  "mother-daughter",
  "other"
)
write.csv(edge_U2023, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2023.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#colony size
```{r}
gbi_objects <- ls(pattern = "^GBI_U\\d{4}$")

colony_size_UA <- data.frame(
  year = numeric(),
  colony_size = numeric()
)

for (obj in gbi_objects) {
  gbi_data <- get(obj)
  year <- as.numeric(gsub("GBI_U", "", obj))
  
  n_individuals <- ncol(gbi_data)
  
  colony_size_UA <- rbind(colony_size_UA, data.frame(
    year = year,
    colony_size = n_individuals
  ))
}

colony_size_UA <- colony_size_UA[order(colony_size_UA$year), ]

write.csv(colony_size_UA, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/colony_size_UA.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
#import all full edges
```{r}
edge_U2013<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2013.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL); edge_U2014<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2014.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL); edge_U2015<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2015.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL); edge_U2016<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2016.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL); edge_U2017<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2017.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL); edge_U2018<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2018.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL); edge_U2019<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2019.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL); edge_U2020<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2020.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL); edge_U2021<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2021.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL); edge_U2022<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2022.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL); edge_U2023<-read.csv("C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_U2023.csv",header=TRUE,sep=",",check.names = F,row.names=NULL)
```
#ALL years
```{r}
edge_U2013$year<-2013;edge_U2014$year<-2014;edge_U2015$year<-2015;edge_U2016$year<-2016;edge_U2017$year<-2017;edge_U2018$year<-2018;edge_U2019$year<-2019;edge_U2020$year<-2020;edge_U2021$year<-2021;edge_U2022$year<-2022;edge_U2023$year<-2023

full_edges_UA<- rbind(edge_U2013, edge_U2014, edge_U2015, edge_U2016, edge_U2017, edge_U2018, edge_U2019, edge_U2020, edge_U2021, edge_U2022, edge_U2023)

write.csv(full_edges_UA, "C:/Users/flo_r/Desktop/master thesis/analysis/variables UA/full_UA/full_edges_UA.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
